{{Quote|He's blind as an Orkellian cave slug.|Bane, on Skere Kaan|<ref name="Path of Destruction" />}}
The '''Orkellian cave slug''',<ref name="Path of Destruction" /> also known as the '''Orkellian space slug''',<ref name="SW2">[[Star Wars (2013) 2|''Star Wars'' (2013) 2]]</ref> was a type of blind [[Slug (creature)/Legends|slug]]<ref name="Path of Destruction" /> native to the [[Orkellia system/Legends|Orkellia system]]<ref name="Planetnamia" /> of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> Around [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]],<ref name="date">In ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]] accuses [[Skere Kaan]] of ignorance shortly before traveling to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]]. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates Bane's journey to Lehon to [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].</ref> the newly-proclaimed [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]] compared his fellow Dark Lord [[Skere Kaan]]'s ignorance about the potential of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] to the blindness of an Orkellian [[Cave/Legends|cave]] slug.<ref name="Path of Destruction" /> A [[Time/Legends|millennium]] later, that same disability of the slug was compared by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to waiting in his [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|starship]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], while its [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor array]] was under repair.<ref name="SW2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Orkellian cave slug was first mentioned in [[Drew Karpyshyn]]'s [[2006]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''.<ref name="Path of Destruction" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
*[[Star Wars (2013) 2|''Star Wars'' (2013) 2]] {{Mo}}
